payload.tactic: have -> : BRA.big predT (fun (n0 : nonce) => (size (filter (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`1 = n0) Mem.lc{hr}))%r) (undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})) = (BIA.big predT (fun (n0 : nonce) => count (pred1 n0) (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})) (undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})))%r by rewrite sumr_ofint; apply BRA.eq_bigr => n0 _ /=; rewrite count_map size_filter.
